brand.story: At Entremares, we believe in the power of tradition and the joy of giving. Each alfajor is a testament to generations of craftsmanship, made with love and the finest ingredients.
brand.craftsmanship: Discover the rich heritage of craftsmanship and authentic flavor in every alfajor.

pages.contactDescription: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the alfajor you're looking for doesn't exist.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Entremares, we believe that every alfajor tells a story. We are committed to preserving traditional Argentine recipes while bringing them to the world with pride. Each piece is handcrafted with the finest ingredients and unwavering attention to detail.

excellence.title: Handcrafted Excellence
excellence.description: Our makers use time-honored techniques passed down through generations. We refuse to compromise on quality, which is why we use only the finest butter, pure dulce de leche, and premium chocolate in every alfajor we create.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Using only the finest, most premium ingredients

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Handcrafted with care and attention to detail

pistache-intenso.name: Pistache Intenso
pistache-intenso.description: Handcrafted alfajor filled with rich pistachio.
pistache-intenso.longDescription: The 'Pistache Intenso' offers a vibrant experience, combining our signature dough with a rich cream and pistachio praline, coated in white chocolate.

chocolate-blanco-nuez.name: Chocolate Blanco con Nuez
chocolate-blanco-nuez.description: Tender alfajor dipped in premium white chocolate with walnut pieces.
chocolate-blanco-nuez.longDescription: A perfect fusion of smoothness and crunchy texture. Our white chocolate alfajor with selected walnut pieces is a reimagined classic for the most demanding palates.

vinho-do-porto.name: Vinho do Porto
vinho-do-porto.description: A refined experience with notes of Port wine.
vinho-do-porto.longDescription: A tribute to our Iberian roots and local influence. The filling is gently infused with prestigious Port Wine, enveloped in dark chocolate and offering a unique aromatic finish.

caramelo-salado.name: Caramelo Salado
caramelo-salado.description: The perfect balance between sweetness and hints of sea salt.
caramelo-salado.longDescription: Discover the addictive contrast of our Salted Caramel. The classic dulce de leche fused with premium sea salt flakes creates an unparalleled flavor explosion.

chocolate-intenso.name: Chocolate Intenso
chocolate-intenso.description: For true lovers of pure cocoa.
chocolate-intenso.longDescription: A dark alfajor designed for cocoa purists. With a triple dip of 80% Belgian chocolate and a deep ganache filling, this piece is pure intensity.
